name: kuzushi-security
description: Marketplace for the kuzushi-security-plugin — an autonomous white-box (static source) security review pipeline for Claude Code.

plugins.name: kuzushi-security-plugin
plugins.description: Autonomous, language-aware white-box (static source) security review pipeline: context, x-ray, PASTA threat model, CVE threat-intel, invariant testing, and adversarial threat-hunting. Static-only — no live target, proxy, or traffic capture. Self-contained, no external engine.
